revision.comment: Bypass shortcuts. Shortcuts are for editor convenience on talk pages and in the URL bar, not for educating editors (often new ones) where and what things are.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}[[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}[[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]]
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}} }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}} }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}} }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}} }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1300099827|1300099827]] by [[Special:Contributions/Waddie96|Waddie96]] ([[User talk:Waddie96|talk]]) templatedata belongs on doc page
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}[[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}[[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1300099827|1300099827]] by [[Special:Contributions/Waddie96|Waddie96]] ([[User talk:Waddie96|talk]]) templatedata belongs on doc page
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}[[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}[[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] }}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{#switch:{{{1|}}} |categorytree=[[mw:Extension:CategoryTree|categorytree]] |charinsert=[[mw:Extension:CharInsert|charinsert]] |ce=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|ce]] |chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|chem]] |gallery=[[Help:Gallery tag|gallery]] |graph=[[Help:Graph|graph]] |hiero=[[mw:Extension:WikiHiero|hiero]] |includeonly=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|includeonly]] |indicator=[[mw:Help:Page status indicators|indicator]] |imagemap=[[mw:Extension:ImageMap|imagemap]] |inputbox=[[mw:Extension:InputBox|inputbox]] |mapframe=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer|mapframe]] |maplink=[[mw:Extension:Kartographer#|maplink]] |math=[[mw:Extension:Math|math]] |math chem=[[Help:Displaying a formula#Chemistry|math chem]] |noinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|noinclude]] |nowiki=[[Help:Wikitext#Nowiki|nowiki]] |onlyinclude=[[Help:Template#Noinclude, includeonly, and onlyinclude|onlyinclude]] |poem=[[mw:Extension:Poem|poem]] |pre=[[Help:Wikitext#Pre|pre]] |ref=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|ref]] |references=[[mw:Extension:Cite/Cite.php|references]] |score=[[Help:Score|score]] |section=[[mw:Extension:Labeled Section Transclusion|section]] |source=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|source]] |syntaxhighlight=[[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] |templatedata=[[Wikipedia:TemplateData/Tutorial|templatedata]] |templatestyles=[[mw:Extension:TemplateStyles|templatestyles]] |timeline=[[mw:Extension:EasyTimeline|timeline]] |#default={{{1|}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|open}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using xtag template with unsupported tag name]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
